title: Ayra TRQP Recognition Response
description: Recognition response schema conforming to the Ayra TRQP Profile v0.5.0-draft. Uses the flat response shape from the Ayra Implementers Guide. See: https://ayraforum.github.io/ayra-trust-registry-resources/guides/

entity_id.description: The ecosystem DID being tested for recognition. MUST be a did:webvh DID.

authority_id.description: The recognizing authority (e.g. did:webvh:ayra.forum for ATN queries).

action.description: The action being checked (typically 'recognize' for Ayra network queries).

resource.description: The resource scope (typically 'ecosystem' for Ayra network queries).

recognized.description: Recognition decision. true = recognized, false = not recognized.

time_evaluated.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the recognition decision was evaluated.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the recognition decision.

$comment: For the Ayra two-step verifier flow: first POST /recognition to did:webvh:ayra.forum with action='recognize' and resource='ecosystem', then POST /authorization to the target ecosystem's Trust Registry endpoint.
